sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports low back pain with muscle spasms, exacerbated by walking. He describes a feeling of a spasm. The patient reports nasal congestion. The patient is taking ibuprofen. The patient is applying heat. The patient reports increased walking.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's home blood pressure readings have been good. Examination reveals no acute findings.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has low back pain and nasal congestion.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor orders lisinopril. The doctor prescribes meloxicam 15 milligrams once a day. The doctor prescribes lisinopril 10 milligrams a day.
